metadata.description: An automatic guardrail for AI-generated results: re-run the work, recompute the headline number from raw outputs, and block the wrong one before it ships.

plugins.name: calma
plugins.description: An automatic guardrail for AI-generated results (a metric, a backtest, a cleaned dataset, an aggregate): re-runs the work in a sandbox, recomputes the number from the raw outputs, and blocks the wrong ones before they ship - the verdict comes from deterministic scripts, not a model's opinion. Runs in the agent loop, in CI, or as a PR check.
